Just a suggestion, a system of people coming into the store and getting their orders, eating, and eventually leaving.

reviews.review_title: Mischief Has Never Felt This Good!
reviews.review_description:
A fellow YouTuber showcased this game, and I was instantly hooked. The raccoon’s movement looked so fluid, the visuals so crisp, and the missions so full of chaos that I had to jump in — and I’m glad I did!

This is a fantastic, highly immersive experience. I only enjoy “gorilla-style” locomotion games when they’re done right — and this one nails it, then adds so much more. There are tons of objectives, secrets, and hilarious moments as you wreak havoc and drive the poor chef mad.

The locomotion system deserves special praise: you can climb walls, crawl across ceilings, leap around the environment, and cause more mischief than you can count. The graphics are beautifully optimized, delivering a clean, smooth experience that truly shines in VR.

I never knew I wanted to be a raccoon so badly — exploring restaurants, rooftops, and outdoor spaces looking for trouble has never been so fun.
5 stars from me, and huge thanks to the devs for creating such a delightfully chaotic gem!
omg
This was the first game I bought on my brand new metal quest 3s I love it I love it I love it I love it
Multiplayer

So I have tried this game for a few minutes. I got extremely frustrated on just the tutorial. First the movement! Way to over active I barely push in one direction and I’m sliding entirely to far. The second thing that stuck out is how the HELL do you collect the food? I tried pushing Every button, holding the food to my mouth, pulling triggers while holding food to my mouth. Eventually it said I collected it. It took about 20 minutes to collect the 5 items of food for the tutorial (three should have been enough five is overkill). I found the first piece of golden food and could not collect that either. WTH?

developer_response.body:
Hi there, really sorry to hear about the frustrations you're having with Wreckin' Raccoon. Regarding collecting food, you should pick it up using the trigger either the left or right controller. To eat it, release the trigger when close to your mouth. 

On sliding, this sounds extremely frustrating. Would you be able to reach out to us at either labs@ndreams.com or on our discord server discord.gg/raccoonvr. 

Again, thank you for playing our game and we're sorry that your experience hasn't been what you, or we, would've liked!

reviews.review_title: Had a blast getting up to no good!
reviews.review_description: Fantastic mischief game played from the perspective of a raccoon! I managed to take a poop, cook the poop and throw the poop at the chef. What more do you want? That's right nothing! In other words, I'd easily recommend it.

Running around and climbing and jumping feels great. Love my little raccoon tail and messing with the chef. Farted, pooped, deep fried it, put it in a burger bun, ate it and threw up so I used a sponge to clean it up. Recommended!
